merged_prs.title: [14_1_X]: Backport of fix for Noisy ElectronSeedProducer
[14_1_X]: Backport of fix for Noisy ElectronSeedProducer
[15_0_X] [Backport] Renaming the GTs for Mini to Mini MC Campaigns (Run2+Run3)
[15_0_X] btvNano: fix link between GenCands and decayed hadrons
[15.1.X] add support for multiple input FEDs in `HLTL1NumberFilter`
[15.1.X] Further fixes for HGCal validation at HLT
Phase2-364C: Correct the material contet of the steel cover in the CE-H section
[15_1_X] Bug fixing in the RecoEgamma/plugins/PhotonValidator.cc
[15.1.X] Trim down `ALCAPROMPT` step in the Prompt Calibration Loop
[15.1.X] Adjust `trackingIters01` process modifier usage to be functional in Run3 scenarios
[15_1_X] [Backport] Renaming the GTs for Mini to Mini MC Campaigns (Run2+Run3)

el8_amd64_gcc12.title: Update tag for RecoLocalCalo-HGCalRecProducers to V00-02-00
Update tag for Geometry-HGCalMapping to V00-07-00
Update tag for RecoTracker-MkFit to V00-18-00

merged_prs.title: Fix lifetime issue found in edmWriteConfigs
[HGCAL] Add ECON-T indexer for reading out TPG data
HI GENs fix for rnd seed issue #48814
Update HGCal testbeam relval workflow
[mkFit] propagation to plane in backward fit phase2 and bug fix
[NGT] Add extra NGT scouting track table producer, when using `NANO:@NGTScoutingVal`
Added fillDescriptions method for EcalSeverityLevel
Make TupleOrPointerType use const pointer in SoAConstParametersImpl
Fix memory in case of hepmc3
Reshape LST T3 and T5 building kernels in LST to increase the active threads per warp
Fix to HGCAL unpacker: Move from FEDRawDataCollection to RawDataBuffer
deal with `Fake` HLT menus in `ScoutingMuonTriggerAnalyzer`
PFAnalyzer.cc: use std::abs
Restructure and comment the tau embedding method
add support for multiple input FEDs in `HLTL1NumberFilter`
Update FED Raw Data Dumper tester
Phase2-hgx364D Correct the material content of the steel cover in the CE-H section
CaloCluster forward declaration
Extend `cmsTraceFunction` test to `putenv()` and `--abort`
Fixed Number of Events Data Wfs for Testing
Update the compile-time warp size constant for ROCm 7.0
SoftMuonMvaRun3Estimator: use std::abs
revive support for HLT in the tracking ntuple
SequentialVertexFitter: use std::abs instead of integer abs
[DAQ] skip directory creation in read-only discovery mode
DemonstratorTools: make TMUX slice staggering optional, and disable it in GTTFileWriter
Further fixes for HGCal validation at HLT
Moved Pool based tests from FWCore to IOPool
Remove SwitchProducer and ConditionalTask from the framework
Change job/threads split for Phase-2 HLT timing tests
LST: introduce code to write object data in standalone and fix memory leak
Trim down `ALCAPROMPT` step in the Prompt Calibration Loop
Determine non-process name lookups at begin job
Phase 2 EB trig primitive: needed fix to PR 42633
remove wf 24834.911
mkfit standalone bin file writer updates: track hit order and phase-2 OT cluster size
Renaming the GTs for Mini to Mini MC Campaigns (Run2+Run3)
